_meta.title: How Do You Judge an Athlete? — Talkin Flag Evaluation Philosophy
_meta.source_notebook: Talkin Flag: Global Insights from the Gridiron (e70d736e-e7f2-4360-97b6-0948f10e16c9)
_meta.grounding: Each of the 50 items maps to one trait from the Biopsychosocial Architecture of Elite Athletic Performance (100 traits / 6 dimensions) and its 1-100 tier ranking.
_meta.scoring: option -> {dimension, points}; section score 0-40 raw -> normalized 0-10; fingerprint = 10 practical dims, rolls up to 6 science dims (S1-S6).
_meta.status: LOCKED v1 (owner-approved 2026-06-07). Mappings and prose final for launch.

items.prompt: When you evaluate a player, how much does it matter that a player explodes off the line?
items.source_citation: NotebookLM Biopsychosocial Architecture (efef5d55) trait #71 — High Motor Unit Synchronization

items.prompt: When you evaluate a player, how much does it matter that a player accelerates explosively in the first step?
items.source_citation: NotebookLM Biopsychosocial Architecture (efef5d55) trait #73 — High Rate of Force Development

items.prompt: When you evaluate a player, how much does it matter that a player shows top-end burst and speed?
